title: CountyFusion Scraper Input
description: Search input for GovOS County recorder websites (Clermont, Ross, Butler).

input.title: Search configuration
input.description: Form search config. countyName: Clermont (default), Ross, or Butler. SearchType: "Date" (use fromDate/toDate) or "Instrument" (use instrumentNumbers, comma-separated). FileFormat: "tif" (default) or "pdf".
